parents.subject: LU-16317 build: dkms build requires flex, bison and libmount-devel

commit.subject: LU-16359 llite: Move d_u.d_alias compat define
commit.message:
LU-16359 llite: Move d_u.d_alias compat define

Breaks zpl_d_drop_aliases (seen in 2.1.7)

The only user of d_alias is llite so move the
define to a header private to llite.

Test-Parameters: trivial
HPE-bug-id: LUS-11394
Signed-off-by: Shaun Tancheff <shaun.tancheff@hpe.com>
Change-Id: Ic805bd99325b05b074446654889824838b647df3
